item.description:
Fran Berry reposteó TDN @theTDN · 42min “You get an MRI scan and a biopsy and then I got it [prostate] removed in the last week of February.”
Joe Fanning Not Ruling Out Riding Return After Cancer Treatment De thoroughbreddailynews.com 3 9 1 mil
